cot_prefix: Okay, let's read through the text carefully to find the correct answer. First, Yves Gomes is a university student in Maryland. He was brought to the U.S. at age 14 months, and his parents were deported more than a year ago. He wants to finish college and go to medical school. He is against being sent back to India because he's been in the U.S. since he was a baby and has worked to get into college. He hopes the DREAMAct will pass so he can stay.
